description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with shoulder-length hair, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a short-sleeved, fitted top and high-waisted, straight-leg pants, paired with low-profile shoes. The figure's facial features are simplified, with a smooth, cartoon-like appearance and no visible accessories or carried items. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a casual, everyday urban look. The shoes are rounded and flat, suitable for walking on city streets or sidewalks. The overall form is clean and minimalistic, with no visible seams or intricate details.
description: A stylized adult female figure in a T-pose, wearing a fitted top, straight-leg pants, and flat shoes, with shoulder-length hair and a smooth, cartoon-like appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full arm span with both hands extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the contour of the torso, and the side of the legs and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, hair, upper back, and the backs of the legs and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, torso, and the side of the legs and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved top and straight-leg pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
